channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold’
item.description: Former US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent had warned Israel could ‘sabotage’ the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Americans question Trump’s instinct on Iran war
item.description: Americans are split on whether to trust Donald Trump's instinct-driven approach to the Iran conflict.

item.title: JD Vance says Iran would be ‘dumb’ to let talks collapse over Lebanon
item.description: The US vice president says Iran had a 'legitimate misunderstanding' about Lebanon's inclusion in this week's ceasefire.

item.title: Trump administration signals it is mulling NATO withdrawal after Iran war
item.description: The US president has lashed out at European partners for declining to contribute military forces to the war on Iran.

item.title: Macron welcomes US-Iran ceasefire and urges Lebanon’s inclusion
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron welcomed the US-Iran ceasefire as “very good news".

item.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on countries that supply Iran with weapons
item.description: It's not clear under what legal authority Trump can tack on this tariff, and analysts called it an 'empty threat'.

item.title: Devastation in Beirut after Israeli strikes reduce homes to rubble
item.description: Hours after Israel hammered Beirut with multiple air strikes following the US-Iran ceasefire, residents searched for sur

item.title: What to know about Israel’s strikes on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Israel unleashed a massive bombardment on Israel a day after the US and Iran reached a ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Trump has found his Iran off-ramp – but at what cost?
item.description: Domestically and internationally, the effects of the war will be felt for years to come.

item.title: ‘People are afraid’: Lebanese reeling after Israel’s devastating attacks
item.description: Fear and confusion grip Lebanon as Israeli strikes devastate the country and its place in the ceasefire is contested.
